mapper.select:
select * from banner_info
and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
order by sort desc, id desc
select * from banner_info where status = 1 order by sort desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into banner_info(title, image_url, link_url, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{description}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
